actions.title: Monthly Infection Control Audit
actions.description: Conduct monthly ward audits to reduce hospital infections and clinical errors by checking hand hygiene, sterilisation, and PPE use. Implement safety protocols to ensure every patient receives safe, high-quality care and target a hospital-acquired infection rate below 2%.

actions.title: Staff Safety Training Programme
actions.description: Run quarterly safety workshops for all nurses and doctors to reduce clinical errors and implement safety protocols, ensuring every patient receives safe, high-quality care through improved incident reporting and error prevention practices.

actions.title: JCI Accreditation Preparation
actions.description: Lead the Joint Commission International accreditation process to certify hospital-wide patient safety standards, clinical quality protocols, and infection control procedures within 12 months.

actions.title: Deploy Electronic Health Record System
actions.description: Replace paper patient records with a cloud-based electronic health record platform. Train all clinical and admin staff and go live across all departments by year end.

actions.title: Automate Patient Scheduling and Billing
actions.description: Implement an online booking portal and automated billing system to automate admin tasks, making the hospital more efficient and data-driven by cutting appointment no-shows by 30% and replacing manual admin work with digital workflows. This will increate technology useage of the hospital and make it more efficient and data-driven.

actions.title: Upgrade Cybersecurity Infrastructure
actions.description: Audit all hospital IT systems, fix vulnerabilities, enable multi-factor authentication, and set up automated daily data backups to protect patient data.
